title: Network spatial patterns and determinants of China’s hometown chambers of commerce
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"f7o1t","text":"The primary data on HCC establishments as of the end of 2022 were obtained from the Tianyancha platform (https://www.tianyancha.com/), a widely used enterprise credit information database in China. All HCC networks were converted into binary (0/1) matrices for analysis. The final matrix specifications were:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":105,"length":27}],"data":{}},{"key":"8hpc6","text":" Provincial-provincial HCC: 31×31 square matrix (675 records were coded as 1).","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eodse","text":" City-city HCC: 286×286 square matrix (2071 records were coded as 1).","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b6eec","text":" Provincial-city HCC: 236×31 rectangular matrix (798 records were coded as 1).","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cgqrg","text":" City-provincial HCC: 30×270 rectangular matrix (1762 records were coded as 1).","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"6D4D6B9B54B811F0AD2A0A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://www.tianyancha.com"}}}}
